details.test: Task 1: Book 7-day Rishikesh retreat in May under $600
Task 2: Reserve 3-day Varanasi tour in November under $400 with 4+ stars
Task 3: Enroll in evening beginner meditation course starting next Monday under $200
Task 4: Accommodation under $80/night with private room & airport pickup added to wishlist
Task 5: Create daily schedule with yoga, philosophy, kirtan and mark one as intermediate
Task 6: Book 5-class drop-in pass with at least 2 classes from same teacher
Task 7: Purchase 1 yoga mat (<$40) and 2 incense (<$10) with free shipping
Task 8: Submit private spiritual counseling request for next Friday 2–4 PM in-person
Task 9: Set up $75 monthly donation split 50/50 between Scholarship Fund and Temple Maintenance
